items.title: [DC] fishhazardthewizard@🔸morimens-game-chat: But yeah that’s why I’d like a unified idea of what counts as “low investment” o
items.summary:
But yeah that’s why I’d like a unified idea of what counts as “low investment” or “high investment” because there’s just a lot of variables in mori that doesn’t justify a “cost” system, but there’s also a large enough gap in resources and availability between different player groups that I think is necessary to address for teams & character building that I think would be helpful for us to figure out as a community
  └ angbak: Type shit (?) 
  └ princess.goth: just look at the comp and decide for yourself
items.author: fishhazardthewizard
